question: How long have I been collecting vintage films?
ground_truth_answer: You did not mention this information. You mentioned collecting vintage cameras but not vintage films.

retrieval_results.context:
User has been collecting vintage cameras for three months, has amassed a pretty impressive collection, and seeks advice on keeping cameras organized and easily accessible for maintenance and cleaning, feeling proud of the progress.
User is a vintage camera collector seeking advice on proper storage and maintenance to keep their growing collection in good condition and prevent damage, expressing a desire to preserve the value and longevity of their items.
User wants advice on displaying their 17 vintage cameras, including a newly acquired Brownie Hawkeye, currently on a shelf but uncertain if that is the best way to showcase them, and is excited about the recent addition.
User is a Funko POP collector with a large collection, including the entire set of Marvel Cinematic Universe figures, and wants advice on how to store and display them nicely, eager to showcase the collection.
User is a vinyl record collector who recently scored a rare 1978 pressing of Fleetwood Mac's Rumours and wants advice on storing and displaying their vinyl collection so the rare pressing is prominently showcased, excited about the rarity.
User is a poster and art print collector who recently purchased a Mondo poster featuring an illustration of the Hogwarts castle from Harry Potter and wants advice on storing and displaying posters and art prints nicely, eager to highlight the new poster.
